orgId.description: The organization id of the request.

logId.description: The unique log id of the request.

apiKeyId.description: The apiKey used to make the request.

apiKeyAlias.description: The alias of the apiKey used to make the request.

hostRegion.description: The region of the host for the request made by the client.

requestPath.description: The path of the request made by the client.

apiCreditsConsumed.description: The number of API credits consumed by the request.

requestDurationMsecs.description: The duration of the request in milliseconds.

responseCode.description: The response code of the request.

chainId.description: The chain id of the request.

rpcMethod.description: The rpc method of the request.
